item.title: Show HN: A privacy first companion AI
item.description:
I'm flabbergasted that people share their most sensitive messages with companion AI apps. Read their privacy policies. They can read your messages. They also have your email. That combination is a serious security threat.

Replika was just fined €5M in Italy over exactly this.

Yes, this is something I built. All inference runs on-device, no account, no chat data leaves your phone.

Happy to defend every claim.

www.friendai.pro https://apps.apple.com/au/app/friend-ai-private-chat/id67616...

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47905272

Points: 1

# Comments: 0
